personal.name: Raisul Rafi
personal.title: Lead UX/UI Designer & Frontend Developer
personal.tagline: I don't just build screens, I craft user experiences.
personal.bio: I am a passionate and versatile Lead UX/UI Designer and Frontend Developer with over 4 years of experience in creating intuitive and visually stunning digital experiences. With a strong foundation in both design principles and frontend technologies, I excel at bridging the gap between aesthetics and functionality. My expertise lies in crafting user-centered designs that not only captivate users but also drive business success. I thrive in collaborative environments, working closely with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions that exceed client expectations. Whether it's designing engaging interfaces or implementing responsive web applications, I am dedicated to delivering exceptional results that leave a lasting impact.

experience.description: Led a team of designers to create intuitive interfaces, resulting in a 30% increase in user engagement and a 25% boost in customer satisfaction. Collaborated closely with product managers and developers to ensure seamless integration of design and functionality, delivering a cohesive and impactful user experience.

Implemented innovative features such as AI-driven summarization tools and real-time 3D wellbore analysis components, resulting in enhanced reporting efficiency and interactive visualizations for stakeholders.

projects.name: mehaxan
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built with Angular 21 and deployed on Cloudflare Workers. You're looking at it right now!

projects.name: geologiQ
projects.description: Integrated Unity engine with Angular app for real-time 3D rendering of Wellbore elements (e.g., Experiences, Infrastructures). Achieved 150% performance boost through optimized rendering, data fetching, and WebSocket technology for real-time updates. Incorporated cutting-edge features, enabling real-time visual changes based on dynamic data for interactive 3D element customization. Utilized @ngneat/elf to effectively manage application states and settings, enhancing user experience and system maintainability.

projects.name: logistiQ
projects.description: Spearheaded the development of an innovative Angular-based logistic solution for a prominent Well company, resulting in a significant 30% improvement in overall operational efficiency. Successfully integrated cutting-edge features and technologies, leading to a 20% reduction in logistics-related costs and delivering a 25% increase in customer satisfaction through enhanced tracking and real-time updates.

projects.name: Wellbook
projects.description: Built from scratch and contributed significantly to the development of the dashboard, and Gantt view - achieving a 20% faster feature implementation rate compared to initial estimates for very first demo.

projects.name: Wellbore Analyzer
projects.description: Pioneered the creation of an Angular-based data analysis and visualization solution for a Well company, empowering stakeholders to gain valuable insights from vast datasets with a remarkable 40% reduction in data processing time. Implemented interactive and dynamic visualizations, enabling the company to make data-driven decisions efficiently, resulting in a 30% improvement in well-site performance and a 20% increase in resource utilization, leading to significant cost savings.

projects.name: Oslofjordens Friluftsråd
projects.description: Led development of a state-of-the-art Angular website, emphasizing scalability, modularity, optimization, and top-tier security. Delivered an impressive 80%+ performance improvement over the previous solution. Managed seamless integration of vital features (SEO, Internationalization, Accessibility) driving a remarkable 230% sales surge in one year. Implemented MapBox, elevating user engagement by 400% via Google Analytics. Streamlined booking checkout with Nets Easy Payment API, enhancing user experience.

projects.name: Bonik POS
projects.description: Played a pivotal role in developing an Angular-based Web-based Point of Sales (POS) application, facilitating seamless transactions and inventory management with a notable 25% increase in checkout speed. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate advanced features, resulting in a 15% rise in overall sales revenue and a 20% reduction in inventory discrepancies, positively impacting the company's bottom line and enhancing customer satisfaction

projects.name: SILENCE ERP
projects.description: Played a pivotal role in developing a cutting-edge Angular-based Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) solution, streamlining business processes and fostering a 25% increase in overall operational efficiency. Successfully integrated diverse modules, including finance, inventory, and human resources, resulting in a 30% reduction in manual data entry and a 40% improvement in data accuracy, significantly enhancing decision-making capabilities for the organization.

projects.name: Jain Laboratories
projects.description: Developed an interactive product showcasing website for Jain Laboratories Ltd, resulting in a significant increase in user engagement. Implemented the website using Angular, achieving an impressive loading time of less than 3 seconds, thereby enhancing the overall user experience and reducing the bounce rate by 40% than the previous website. Leveraged Figma to design and prototype the website, facilitating seamless collaboration with the design and development teams. Utilizing Tailwind CSS as the CSS library, reduced the initial development time by 30%-40%, leading to quicker project delivery

projects.name: Jomidar
projects.description: Developed and designed web application and mobile application, utilizing Angular and Ionic frameworks. Led the creation of the web application from scratch, while also crafting the UI design using Adobe XD. Leveraged expertise in Angular and Ionic to build both web and mobile components of the application, demonstrating a strong aptitude for front-end development and responsive design. Collaborated as a Junior Software Engineer, gaining valuable experience in software development lifecycle and UI/UX implementation.
